'''âs-w-sh''' ('''kasawash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hinny|hinny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hinny|hinny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-w-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasawash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisawash|thisawash]] || [[word:jisawash|jisawash]] || [[word:shisawash|shisawash]] || [[word:kisawash|kisawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusawash|thuthusawash]] || [[word:jujusawash|jujusawash]] || [[word:shushusawash|shushusawash]] || [[word:kukusawash|kukusawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusawash|thusawash]] || [[word:jusawash|jusawash]] || [[word:shusawash|shusawash]] || [[word:kusawash|kusawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusawash|thusawash]] || [[word:jusawash|jusawash]] || [[word:shusawash|shusawash]] || [[word:kusawash|kusawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesawash|thesawash]] || [[word:jesawash|jesawash]] || [[word:shesawash|shesawash]] || [[word:kesawash|kesawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosawash|thothosawash]] || [[word:jojosawash|jojosawash]] || [[word:shoshosawash|shoshosawash]] || [[word:kokosawash|kokosawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosawash|thosawash]] || [[word:josawash|josawash]] || [[word:shosawash|shosawash]] || [[word:kosawash|kosawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosawash|thosawash]] || [[word:josawash|josawash]] || [[word:shosawash|shosawash]] || [[word:kosawash|kosawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsawash|thĂŠsawash]] || [[word:jĂŠsawash|jĂŠsawash]] || [[word:shĂŠsawash|shĂŠsawash]] || [[word:kĂŠsawash|kĂŠsawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasawash|thathasawash]] || [[word:jajasawash|jajasawash]] || [[word:shashasawash|shashasawash]] || [[word:kakasawash|kakasawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasawash|thasawash]] || [[word:jasawash|jasawash]] || [[word:shasawash|shasawash]] || [[word:kasawash|kasawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasawash|thasawash]] || [[word:jasawash|jasawash]] || [[word:shasawash|shasawash]] || [[word:kasawash|kasawash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasawash|shasawash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasawash|goshasawash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasawash|gokishasawash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasawashnĂŒ|shasawashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasawashnknĂŒ|goshasawashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawashnĂŒ|gokishasawashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasawashĂ«|shasawashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasawashnkshĂ«|goshasawashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasawashĂ«|gokishasawashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawashro|shasawashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawashnkro|goshasawashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawashro|gokishasawashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawashmu|shasawashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawashnkmu|goshasawashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawashmu|gokishasawashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasawasher|shasawasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasawashnksher|goshasawashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasawasher|gokishasawasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasawashng|shasawashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasawashnkng|goshasawashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasawashng|gokishasawashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasawashya|shasawashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasawashnkya|goshasawashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasawashya|gokishasawashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasawashyam|shasawashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasawashnkyam|goshasawashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasawashyam|gokishasawashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasawashnĂŒshĂ«|shasawashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasawashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasawashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasawashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasawashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawashnĂŒro|shasawashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawashnknĂŒro|goshasawashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawashnĂŒro|gokishasawashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawashnĂŒmu|shasawashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawashnknĂŒmu|goshasawashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawashnĂŒmu|gokishasawashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasawashĂ«nĂŒ|shasawashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasawashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasawashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasawashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawashĂ«ro|shasawashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawashnkshĂ«ro|goshasawashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawashĂ«ro|gokishasawashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawashĂ«mu|shasawashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawashnkshĂ«mu|goshasawashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawashĂ«mu|gokishasawashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasawashronĂŒ|shasawashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasawashnkronĂŒ|goshasawashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawashronĂŒ|gokishasawashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasawashroshĂ«|shasawashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasawashnkroshĂ«|goshasawashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasawashroshĂ«|gokishasawashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawashromu|shasawashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawashnkromu|goshasawashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawashromu|gokishasawashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasawashmunĂŒ|shasawashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasawashnkmunĂŒ|goshasawashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawashmunĂŒ|gokishasawashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasawashmushĂ«|shasawashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasawashnkmushĂ«|goshasawashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasawashmushĂ«|gokishasawashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawashmuro|shasawashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawashnkmuro|goshasawashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawashmuro|gokishasawashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
